title: The Ocean Inside the Whale
description: On pages 6–9, the ocean inside the whale as inside the whale, the crew meets Crocus and begins to understand Laboon’s pain and strange living arrangements.
scene: The Ocean Inside the Whale. Inside the whale, the crew meets Crocus and begins to understand Laboon’s pain and strange living arrangements. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So he's started again, has he...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So then this ocean is actually stomach acid!? If we stay here any longer than this, our ship will be dissolved!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey! What's going on! Give us an explanation!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This whale,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: has started bashing his head against the red line again...!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Now that he mentions it... I remember that whale's forehead was covered in scars...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ...and he was bellowing up at the sky!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What does it all mean?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It means he's suffering...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: BOO Ohh haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I got it...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He must be trying to kill this whale from the inside!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Now then...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What a nasty way to kill something...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Well, if the mystery's been solved, let's leave already.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We'll be dissolved if we hang around any longer.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's right. I don't have anything against whaling and it's not like we're obligated to save this whale, either.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So let's just get out of here.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wq zsom

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What's going on!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Aghhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Alright, we've successfully managed to infiltrate this far inside! Listen up, Miss Wednesday.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Beyond this door is the whale's stomach, and that old man is probably inside as well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: OUR MISSION IS TO ELIMATE THAT GEEZER...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: This is all for this whale!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: mysterious man Mr. 9

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: Yes, Mr. 9. This whale is our town's sweet honey, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Mysterious woman Ms. Wednesday

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Ahh, my head is spinning!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What!? A dead end!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Daf!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What is it this time?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Is this an ocean or a river? Looks like a waterway of some sort...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Agh, I'm sliding down!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Hey, if this whale keeps on rampaging like this, it's going to be hard to even reach the exit!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Well if we don't hurry, our lives and luffy's will be in danger.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: He's not inside with us. I saw him escape outside the whale's mouth!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the ocean inside the whale. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
